detectors.description:
Reentrancy in TheGoldenPortal._transfer(address,address,uint256) (TheGoldenPortal.sol#653-777):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (TheGoldenPortal.sol#717)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (TheGoldenPortal.sol#791-803)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (TheGoldenPortal.sol#723)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (TheGoldenPortal.sol#811)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TheGoldenPortal.sol#775)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (TheGoldenPortal.sol#937)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (TheGoldenPortal.sol#917)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (TheGoldenPortal.sol#919)
	TheGoldenPortal._rOwned (TheGoldenPortal.sol#329) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TheGoldenPortal._takeTeam(uint256) (TheGoldenPortal.sol#931-939)
	- TheGoldenPortal._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (TheGoldenPortal.sol#891-927)
	- TheGoldenPortal.balanceOf(address) (TheGoldenPortal.sol#479-483)
	- TheGoldenPortal.constructor() (TheGoldenPortal.sol#413-443)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TheGoldenPortal.sol#775)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (TheGoldenPortal.sol#945)
	TheGoldenPortal._rTotal (TheGoldenPortal.sol#341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TheGoldenPortal._getCurrentSupply() (TheGoldenPortal.sol#1087-1097)
	- TheGoldenPortal._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (TheGoldenPortal.sol#943-949)
	- TheGoldenPortal.constructor() (TheGoldenPortal.sol#413-443)
	- TheGoldenPortal.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (TheGoldenPortal.sol#575-597)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [TheGoldenPortal._transfer(address,address,uint256)](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L653-L777):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L717)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L791-L803)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L723)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L811)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L775)

		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L917)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L919)
	[TheGoldenPortal._rOwned](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L329) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [TheGoldenPortal._takeTeam(uint256)](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L931-L939)
	- [TheGoldenPortal._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L891-L927)
	- [TheGoldenPortal.balanceOf(address)](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L479-L483)
	- [TheGoldenPortal.constructor()](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L413-L443)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L775)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L945)
	[TheGoldenPortal._rTotal](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [TheGoldenPortal._getCurrentSupply()](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L1087-L1097)
	- [TheGoldenPortal._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L943-L949)
	- [TheGoldenPortal.constructor()](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L413-L443)
	- [TheGoldenPortal.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](TheGoldenPortal.sol#L575-L597)
